overall.description: A player character rides a spectral winged mount through a dark fantasy coastal canyon at night, transitioning from narrow cliff passages to open aerial views over ocean waters, eventually landing on a grassy precipice near stone ruins and passive creatures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow misty canyon between dark rock walls

agents.ego_description: navigating the winged mount through a tight canyon passage with steep rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: dark sheer rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon passage
dark sheer rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon passage
thick atmospheric mist filling the canyon depth below the flight path
silhouetted stone structures visible through the distant canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a flight through a narrow, mist-filled canyon at night. Dark rock walls enclose the path on both sides while atmospheric fog obscures the canyon floor below. The winged mount navigates the tight passage toward a distant opening where ancient ruins are silhouetted against the blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal airspace above ocean with ancient stone structures

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open coastal airspace revealing expansive ocean and distant ruins

agents.ego_description: soaring over dark ocean waters while following the coastline and approaching ancient stone pillars

entered.detail: dark blue ocean waters visible below the flight path extending to the horizon
steep rocky cliff face lining the right side of the coastline
tall ancient stone columns rising from the ocean surface
grass-covered cliff top approaching the landing zone

segments.scene_description: The mount emerges from the canyon into an expansive coastal vista, revealing dark ocean waters below and ancient stone pillars rising from the sea. The camera follows the coastline where steep cliffs give way to grassy edges, with the ruins now visible on the left horizon as the flight continues through the open night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy cliff top with stone ruins and grazing creatures

events.description: winged mount descends and lands on the grassy cliff terrain
transition from aerial flight to ground movement near passive creatures

agents.ego_description: landing the mount on a grassy precipice and moving toward passive sheep-like creatures grazing nearby

notable_agents.action: white sheep-like creature grazing peacefully on the grass

entered.detail: green grass-covered ground of the cliff top landing zone
burning fire pit providing warm orange light on the cliff edge
ancient crumbling stone walls and structures on the cliff top

segments.scene_description: The mount descends toward a grassy cliff top dotted with ancient stone ruins and glowing braziers. After landing, the character moves across the terrain toward a passive sheep-like creature grazing peacefully nearby. The stone ruins stand prominently on the left while the ocean remains visible in the distant background under the dark blue night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through a claustrophobic, mist-shrouded canyon that gradually opens into a vast coastal landscape. It begins by navigating a narrow passage enclosed by dark rock walls and atmospheric fog, moving steadily toward a distant opening where ancient ruins are silhouetted against the blue night sky. As the mount emerges from the canyon, the scene expands into an expansive vista of dark ocean waters and stone pillars rising from the sea, with the camera tracking along steep cliffs and grassy edges. The flight then descends toward a grassy cliff top dotted with glowing braziers and stone ruins before finally landing on the terrain. The movement concludes as the character walks across the grass toward a passive, sheep-like creature grazing peacefully with the distant ocean still visible under the dark night sky.
